reviews.comment:
En la temporada de verano se arman filas interminables.

(Translated by Google)
During the summer season, endless queues form.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNneTh5ZXFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bien, se hace bastante fila por la alta demanda de la zona y la falta de estaciones de servicio. Esta bueno que no te cobran para inflar ruedas

(Translated by Google)
Okay, there's quite a line due to high demand in the area and a lack of gas stations. It's good that they don't charge for inflating tires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNndGZQTlRnEAE

reviews.comment:
No me gusto mucho por la demora de atender a los clientes los operadores de la estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like it much because of the slow service from the gas station attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBaTdMY2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios. Por su ubicación en el centro tener mucha fila para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean. Because of its central location, there are often long lines for gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBamVQNjRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos 1hr esperando que el camión descargue combustible ( ese no es el problema) pero llego un pala bobcat y la hicieron pasar por delante del camión y le cargaron combustible
La atención no tendría que ser igual para todos?

(Translated by Google)
We waited an hour for the truck to unload fuel (that's not the problem), but then a Bobcat loader arrived and they let it go ahead of the truck and filled it with fuel. Shouldn't the service be the same for everyone?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBei1QTDNRRRAB
